summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Excel processing application. All core functionality working correctly including Intelipost API configuration, tab navigation, history endpoint, and professional design compliance.

minor_issues.issue: CORS OPTIONS request returns 405 instead of 200/204
minor_issues.impact: Minor - doesn't affect main functionality, only preflight requests

passed_tests: History endpoint returning proper JSON structure
All three tabs navigation (Cotação, Busca CEP, Histórico)
Configuration modal opening and form submission
File upload dropzones present and functional
Process buttons properly disabled when no file selected
Toast notifications working for configuration save
